message:
fix(dashboard): address code review issues in vsock terminal

- Fix double-close in createVsockSession: call session.Close() instead
  of conn.Close() when SendOpen fails, since VsockSession owns the conn
- Add session registration: register session with TerminalManager and
  defer removal for proper session tracking
- Fix race condition in ReadMessage: check closed state under lock, then
  release lock before blocking read to avoid deadlock with Send methods

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
